_doc: Didit V3 webhook 'Resubmitted' fixture. Maps to internal status='resubmission_pending' (Batch B 2026-05-07). Persists resubmit_info to customer_kyc_sessions.resubmission_info jsonb, triggers customer.kyc_resubmission_requested audit, dispatches kyc.session.resubmission_required firm webhook event + customer email with feature labels + Didit resume URL.
